Use Content Patcher Only.Description: If this box is checked, disables the C# portion of this mod, which is used to adjust certain Prize Machine and Mystery Box prizes, the prices of certain hardcoded items when sold by the Traveling Merchant, and if SVE is installed ensures Joja Mart uses Better Balance prices for seeds. Requires reloading the save file to take effect.

Crops Value Multiplier.Description: The value of all farmed Crops, their Seeds, and their products such as Pale Ale, Green Tea, Flour, etc. (except for Flowers and their products) is multiplied by this value.

Farm Forage Value Multiplier.Description: The value of all farm-growable forage items such as mushrooms, tree syrups/saps, wild plants from Seasonal Seeds, and the Seasonal Seeds themselves (includes Fiddlehead Fern but does not include Grapes or Truffles) is multiplied by this value.

Flower & Honey Value Multiplier.Description: The value of all Honey, Mead, any Flowers that can produce Honey, and their Seeds is multiplied by this value.

Animal Product Value Multiplier.Description: The value of all products from farm Animals (includes Truffles, Cheese, Mayo, etc. but not Honey, Fish, or items from Fish Ponds) is multiplied by this value.

Late-Game Animal Product Value Multiplie.Description: This stacks multiplicatively with the above multiplier, but only activates later in the game once certain crackers become available (Does not apply to Truffles as those are unaffected by crackers and instead increase in value 1.2x once crackers become available). This is intended to help Crops to stay viable after the huge boost to animal profits at that point. (Set this to 1 to effectively disable this feature)

Animal Resale Value Multiplier.Description: The sale value of all Animals when selling the animal itself is multiplied by this value.

Fish Value Multiplier.Description: The value of all Fish is multiplied by this value (affects the value of Roe, Caviar, and Smoked Fish but not other items from Fish Ponds).

Cooked Food Value Multiplier.Description: The value of all foods cookable in the kitchen is multiplied by this value. If Balanced Food Prices below is enabled, this value effectively sets the global profit margin for all cooked foods. E.G. A value of 1.15 here means all cooked foods sell for 115% of their (regular quality, professionless) ingredient value.

Balanced Food Prices.Description: Sets the base value of foods cookable in the kitchen to be equal to the sum of their (regular quality, professionless) ingredients at default Better Balance prices (exceptions for Sashimi & Maki Roll). Dynamically takes any Multipliers above into account when considering the price of ingredients, but not professions or other bonuses.

Adjust Crystalarium Speed.Description: Makes the Crystalarium take ~3x as long to clone most gems (~1.5x as long for Quartzes), to fit the price balance of this mod.

Harder & Mossier Speed-Gro Recipe.Description: Makes the recipes for Speed-Gro & Deluxe Speed-Gro require some Hardwood & Moss instead of their normal ingredients. Also increases the sap cost of Quality Fertilizer and stone cost of Quality Retaining Soil. (This overrides the alternative recipes for these 4 items in the SVE or Crafting and Construction from SVE mods, if those are enabled)

Trade Crackers for Fertilizer.Description: Allows you to trade certain late-game crackers for top-tier fertilizers or Raisins at Pierre's, to give them a use for Crops and help Crops stay a viable option.

More Expensive Mushroom Log.Description: Makes the Mushroom Log cost 1.2x as much Hardwood, 1.5x Moss, and also 2 Red & 3 Common Mushrooms to craft.

Mushroom Log Days to grow.Description: The Vanilla Mushroom Log can be harvested every 4 days (shortened by rainy days). This slows it down to help balance the profits.

Mushroom Log stops in Winter.Description: Prevents the Mushroom Log from producing new mushrooms in Winter. Even with this change, it can still eventually outproduce most other crops in profits per year with the right setup.

More Expensive Fish Smoker.Description: Makes the Fish Smoker cost 1.2x as much Hardwood to craft, but the recipe cost 0.35x as much money to buy.

Minutes needed to Smoke a Fish.Description: The Vanilla Fish Smoker takes 50 in-game minutes to work. 1200 minutes causes it to always complete the next day.

Smoked Fish Quality.Description: Makes Smoked Fish from the Fish Smoker always come out at the specified Quality. Selecting Preserved makes it match the quality of the raw fish, the way it works in Vanilla.

Smoked Fish are Artisan Goods.Description: In Vanilla Smoked Fish count as Artisan Goods and benefit from the Artisan profession. Uncheck this box to instead have Smoked Fish be categorized as Fish and thus no longer increase in value with the Artisan Profession.

Cheaper Gold Clock & Scepter.Description: Reduces the cost of the Gold Clock and a certain Scepter by half. Can be used to help account for how the maximum possible income with Better Balance is only around ~30%-40% of the Vanilla maximum.

JojaMart Multiplier non-member.Description: Sets the price multiplier for items at JojaMart without a membership. Vanilla setting is 1.25 (most items cost +25% more than Pierre's)

JojaMart Multiplier member.Description: Sets the price multiplier for items at JojaMart with a membership. Vanilla setting is 1 (most items cost the same as Pierre's)

SVE JojaMart Multiplier.Description: If Stardew Valley Expanded is installed, sets the price multiplier for items at JojaMart regardless of membership. Default SVE setting is 0.9 (most items cost -10% less than Pierre's)

SVE JojaMart Multiplier Joja Day.Description: If Stardew Valley Expanded is installed, sets the price multiplier for items at JojaMart on Joja Day. Default SVE setting is 0.7 (most items cost -30% less than Pierre's)

Adjust SVE Crops, Fish, & Food.Description: If Stardew Valley Expanded is installed, this option rebalances the price & value of SVE crops to fit with Better Balance, and allows the Multipliers above to affect SVE fish & cooked foods (their base value is unchanged). Regardless of this setting, the price bonuses you receive from certain events in SVE will be toned down to fit with Better Balance.

Adjust Custom Items.Description: Has no effect without also editing customItems.json. Add any items (including items added by other mods) to customItems.json with your desired prices and then enable this setting to adjust their prices. More details in the notes at the top of customItems.json.

Custom Value Multiplier.Description: Has no effect without also editing customItems.json (or pricesBalanced.json). The value of all items given the 'Custom Value Multiplier' token in customItems.json (or if added to items in pricesBalanced.json) is multiplied by this value.

DynamicTokens.Name: Animal Product Effective Multiplier
DynamicTokens.Value: {{Query: {{Animal Product Value Multiplier}} * {{Late-Game Animal Product Value Multiplier}} }}
